info.title: REDRIVER 2
info.author: jamyaro
info.details:
A port of REDRIVER2 (https://github.com/OpenDriver2/REDRIVER2), a disassembled version of Driver 2 for PSX.

## Installation

First, set up a working install of REDRIVER 2 on PC using your copy of Driver 2:

1. Follow the [installation instructions for the PC version](https://github.com/OpenDriver2/REDRIVER2/wiki/Installation-instructions).
2. Test that FMVs play back and that levels load. You should end up with a DRIVER2 folder that has:
* New folders, like `MAPS`
* `avi` files in the FMV folders
3. Copy the DRIVER2 folder from your PC install folder to your SD card at `/switch/redriver2`. **Skip overwriting** existing assets when prompted.

## Gameplay Notes
* Controls use dpad by default. Press - and + to switch to analog mode
* Rebind controls, change resolution etc. by editing `/switch/redriver2/config.ini`.
